scripts.buildModuleWin: npm run buildTimelineWin && npm run buildMemoryWin && npm run buildClusterWin
scripts.buildModuleLinux: npm run buildTimelineLinux && npm run buildMemoryLinux && npm run buildClusterLinux
scripts.buildClusterWin: cd .\cluster && npm install --force && npm run build && npm run publishWin
scripts.buildClusterLinux: cd ./cluster && npm install --force && npm run build && npm run publishLinux
scripts.buildMemoryWin: cd .\memory && npm install --force && npm run build && npm run publishWin
scripts.buildMemoryLinux: cd ./memory && npm install --force && npm run build && npm run publishLinux
scripts.buildTimelineWin: cd .\timeline && npm install --force && npm run build && npm run publishWin
scripts.buildTimelineLinux: cd ./timeline && npm install --force && npm run build && npm run publishLinux
scripts.testCluster: cd cluster && npm install --force && npm run test
scripts.testMemory: cd memory && npm install --force && npm run test
scripts.testTimeline: cd timeline && npm install --force && npm run test
